title: About us
body: "The government is committed to a programme of new nuclear projects beyond Sizewell C, giving industry and investors the confidence they need to deliver projects at speed.  Great British Energy - Nuclear (GBE-N) has been launched as part of the government’s Powering Up Britain plan.  Responsibilities  GBE-N is responsible for driving delivery of new nuclear projects. We will co-fund the selected technologies through their development and work with successful bidders on ensuring the right financing and site arrangements are in place.  This is in line with the government’s commitment to take 2 Final Investment Decisions next parliament.  Priorities  The first priority of GBE-N is to launch a competitive process to select the best Small Modular Reactor (SMR) technologies.  Our management    Gwen Parry-Jones OBE - GBE-N Interim CEO   Simon Bowen - GBE-N Interim Chair   Who we are  Great British Energy - Nuclear is an arm’s length body of the Department for Energy Security and Net Zero, with statutory powers designated to it under the Energy Act 2023 to facilitate the design, construction, commissioning and operation of nuclear energy generation projects for the purpose of furthering any policies published by His Majesty’s government.  Great British Energy - Nuclear is a company registered in England and Wales with registered number 05027024. Our registered office is at Department for Energy Security and Net Zero, 3-8 Whitehall Place, London, SW1A 2EG.  "
